LanguageData.HD_Stat_MechanicalRole_Emitter_Desc: Supplies rotational power and torque to a mechanical network.
LanguageData.HD_Stat_MechanicalRole_User_Desc: Operates by drawing torque from a mechanical network.
LanguageData.HD_Stat_MechanicalRole_Transmitter_Desc: Transfers mechanical power between adjacent mechanical devices.
LanguageData.HD_Stat_MechanicalSourceType_Desc:
The type of mechanical power source used by this device.

SteamEngine: A steam engine. RPM mismatch can damage gears and structure, while low-RPM high-torque overload can cause severe structural damage.

Engine: A combustion engine. RPM mismatch can cause overheating and fire, while overload can break the engine down or damage its durability.

Motor: An electric motor. RPM mismatch can cause EMP discharge, while overload can drain or explode batteries and may short-circuit the motor.
LanguageData.HD_Stat_MechanicalRecommendedPower_Desc: The mechanical power output this device can supply during normal stable operation.
LanguageData.HD_Stat_MechanicalMaxPower_Desc: The maximum mechanical power output this device can tolerate during overload.
LanguageData.HD_Stat_MechanicalRpmRange_Desc: The minimum and maximum rotational speed this power source can be configured to use.
LanguageData.HD_Stat_MechanicalRpmInaccuracy_Desc: The rotational speed tolerance used when matching this power source with other sources on the network.
LanguageData.HD_Stat_MechanicalRequiredTorque_Desc: The baseline torque this device demands at its recommended RPM.
LanguageData.HD_Stat_MechanicalRpmRequirement_Desc: The minimum RPM required for operation and the recommended RPM for full effective speed.
LanguageData.HD_Stat_MechanicalDefaultGearRatio_Desc: The gear ratio applied to this device immediately after construction.
LanguageData.HD_Stat_MechanicalHazards_Desc: The mechanical hazards this device can have while operating.
LanguageData.HD_SharpshooterMode_Desc: Switches between normal fire and precise sharpshooter fire.
LanguageData.HD_SharpshooterMode_Fanning_Desc: Switches between normal aimed fire and close-range fanning.
LanguageData.HD_SharpshooterMode_DoubleTap_Desc: Switches between normal fire and a fast two-shot follow-up.
